claims.summary: Correspondence should carry explicit reply_requested state rather than infer it from wording.
claims.disposition: implement an additive parsed and persisted reply_requested field with a false legacy default

claims.summary: Message creation time should be distinct from later ledger append or delivery receipt time.
claims.disposition: implement created_at_unix_ms in the envelope header and message/delivery records

claims.summary: Message ID, thread ID, reply_to, actors, turn kind, relational intent, delivery/read state, and body already form a first-class language-only envelope.
claims.disposition: verify envelope round-trip, delivery, reply-link, and legacy-default tests

claims.summary: Making correspondence automatically alter attention, semantic admission, signal weight, or control would change live coupling.
